conversations.content: Today we studied the Orgrimmar Cleft of Shadow Underground Arena Public Order Decree. If match-fixing or cheating is discovered inside the arena...
Cheating in the arena? Treating the audience like fools? What's the punishment when caught?
then Kor'kron elites must immediately storm the arena and detain all participants.
Kor'kron directly making arrests — quite a scene! After detaining them, the penalty depends on the cheating method, right?
Then further action is determined based on the situation: if using banned alchemical stimulants, burn the stimulants on the spot and impose a lifetime ban.
Burning stimulants and lifetime ban for doping — fair! What about bribing referees to fake results?
If bribing referees to forge win-loss records, cut off the involved referees' hands and send the involved gamblers to the Quarry.
Cut off hands? Sent to the Quarry? That's bloody enough! The worst is summoning demons, right?

If secretly summoning demons or using fel magic to interfere with the fight, it is considered a public trampling of the Warchief's honor — execute all fel users on the spot and punish their clans by blood relation.

think: Orgrimmar Cleft Arena: match-fixing/cheating found → Kor'kron detain participants → three outcomes: alchemical stimulants = burn + lifetime ban; bribe referees = cut hands + gamblers sent to Quarry; summon demons/fel magic = on-spot execution + clan punishment.
memory: Orgrimmar Cleft of Shadow Underground Arena Public Order Decree: If match-fixing or cheating is discovered inside the arena, then Kor'kron elites must immediately storm the arena and detain all participants, then further action is determined based on the situation: if using banned alchemical stimulants, burn the stimulants on the spot and impose a lifetime ban; if bribing referees to forge win-loss records, cut off the involved referees' hands and send the involved gamblers to the Quarry; if secretly summoning demons or using fel magic to interfere with the fight, it is considered a public trampling of the Warchief's honor — execute all fel users on the spot and punish their clans by blood relation.
